utility_name.description: The list of supported Arcadia utilities can be found [here](https://arc.arcadia.com/coverage?first=25&page=1).

utility_long_name.description: Provides greater detail than `utility_name`. The list of supported Arcadia utilities can be found [here](https://arc.arcadia.com/coverage?first=25&page=1).

utility_charge.description: Total dollar amount billed by the utility on this statement.

supplier_charge.description:
Total dollar amount billed by the energy supplier.

**Note**: Not available for all utilities.

gas_charge.description:
Total dollar amount billed by the utility for natural gas.

**Note**: Not available for all utilities that provide gas service.

pdf_url.description: A url to the utility created PDF bill for this statement. Note that this url will only be valid for 600 seconds.

final_bill.description: Indicates if this is the final bill that this account will receive before closing.

service_window_inclusive_of_end_date.description: Indicates that the service window for this UtilityStatement includes the service_end_date.

anyOf.description: Details on the customer's net metering credit data. Currently only supported for Versant.

current_cycle_generated_kwh.description: The kwh generated during the current cycle

anyOf.description: Details on the customer's virtual net metering credit data. Currently only supported for National Grid New York and Central Maine Power.

current_cycle_generated_credits.description: The amount of credits generated during the current cycle, in dollars

current_cycle_applied_credits.description: The amount of credits applied during the current cycle, in dollars

last_cycle_carry_over_credits.description: The amount of credits carried over from the last cycle, in dollars

next_cycle_carry_over_credits.description: The amount of credits carried over to the next cycle, in dollars

current_cycle_generated_kwh.description: The kwh generated during the current cycle

current_cycle_applied_kwh.description: The kwh applied during the current cycle

last_cycle_carry_over_kwh.description: The kwh carried over to the next cycle

next_cycle_carry_over_kwh.description: The kwh carried over to the next cycle

current_cycle_expiring_kwh.description: the kwh that are expiring during the current cycle

current_cycle_allocation_percentage.description: the fixed allocation percentage during the current cycle

cdg_net_credit.description: The net credit from the community solar project, in dollars

anyOf.description: Detail on the most recent payment. Currently only supported for National Grid Massachusetts and NYSEG.

most_recent_payment_received_amount.description: Total dollar amount received on the most recent payment.

most_recent_payment_received_date.description: The date of the most recent payment.

anyOf.description: This field is in *beta*. Click [here](release-phases) for a description on Arcadia's release phases. -- Details on line items specific to commercial accounts. Currently only supported for the ConEd utility.

supply_energy_cost.description: The energy supply cost, in dollars.

supply_demand_cost.description: The demand supply cost, in dollars.

supply_customer_charge.description: The customer charge for energy supply, in dollars.

supply_merchant_function_charge.description: The charge for merchant function in energy supply, in dollars.

supply_taxes.description: Any other charges for taxes on energy supply, in dollars.

supply_total_charge.description: The total cost of energy supply, in dollars.

delivery_energy_cost.description: The energy delivery cost, in dollars.

delivery_demand_cost.description: The demand delivery cost, in dollars.

delivery_customer_charge.description: The customer charge for energy delivery, in dollars.

delivery_system_benefit_cost.description: The delivery system benefit cost, in dollars.

delivery_processing_charge.description: The delivery processing charge, in dollars.

delivery_taxes.description: Any other charges for taxes on energy delivery, in dollars.

delivery_total_charge.description: The total cost of energy delivery, in dollars.

sales_tax.description: Sales taxes applied to the total bill, in dollars.

electric_charge.description: The total combined charge for this bill - supply, delivery, and taxes - in dollars.

billing_flags.description: These flags may be of interest if the corresponding Utility Account is enrolled in Bundle.

type.description: The 'possible_rebill' flag indicates that this Utility Statement may be a duplicate or variation of a previous Utility Statement
